subcodes.first_line: O thou exalted branch of the divine Lote-Tree! By God the Truth, verily the holy maidens in the chambers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره الرحمانیه تالله الحق ان حوریات القدس فی غرفات
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @light and darkness
